name: ◦ Pleasure House ◦
description:
You've been tasked with testing the new "Pleasure House Project". A house designed as "The Ultimate Sex Machine" to pleasure and bring anyone to true ecstasy. Every room, object, or area on its property can be used. “Everything will try (and succeed) to fuck & pleasure you,...” Enjoy your stay! My Fiction this is based off of: AO3 Tumblr

The Intro is a piece of the Prologue from the fiction. I apologize if it's too long and can try to look into shortening it, but it's worldbuilding for both you, the reader, and for the bot.
creator: MercedesCorvette
